/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/openssl@3/lib CMakeFiles/profile_ram_zksnark.dir/zk_proof_systems/zksnark/ram_zksnark/profiling/profile_ram_zksnark.cpp.o -o profile_ram_zksnark  libsnark.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_program_options.dylib ../depends/libff/libff/libff.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmp.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmp.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmpxx.dylib -lcrypto /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_container.dylib
